title: Regolamenti dwar Retirement Pensions (European Passport Rights for Institutions for Occupational Retirement Provision) Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 48 tal-2020

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
RETIREMENT PENSIONS (EUROPEAN PASSPORT
RIGHTS FOR INSTITUTIONS FOR OCCUPATIONAL
RETIREMENT PROVISION)

[ L.S.514.05

SUBSIDIARY LEGISLATION 514.05
REGOLAMENTI DWAR RETIREMENT PENSIONS
(EUROPEAN PASSPORT RIGHTS FOR INSTITUTIONS
FOR OCCUPATIONAL RETIREMENT PROVISION)
1 ta’ Jannar, 2015 *
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 9 tal-2015.

Imħassar bl-Avviż Legali 48 tal-2020.
*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*ara r-regolament regulation 1(2) ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti, kif promulgati
oriġinarjament.

1
